prompt: Use my reference photo as the subject (same face/likeness. High-concept editorial fashion photography, I am standing alone in a vast desert at golden hour, surrounded by tall vertical mirror slabs that create sliced reflections and repeated fragments of my body and face. I wear a long beige trench coat, minimal neutral-toned clothing underneath, cinematic wind movement, soft desert dust in the air, warm sand tones and pale blue sky. Each panel should show a different angle: profile reflection, front-facing mirrored duplication, back view with mirror fragments, and a close-up through reflective glass. Ultra-re-alistic, premium magazine aesthetic, clean composition, dramatic.
